trans-unit.source: Connecting urban explorers with rural France
Log in to explore rural experiences
Start date cannot be in the past
End date cannot be in the past
Please enter the number of guests
You will not be charged until the host confirms your booking.
No payment taken now. Your card will be charged only after the host accepts your request.
You won't be charged until the host confirms.
Discover authentic farm stays, fishing retreats, and artisan workshops across France.
No experiences match your current filters. Try broadening your search.
Check back soon — new experiences are added regularly.
The host will review your request and respond soon.
Your request has been sent. The host typically responds within 24 hours.
Your booking is confirmed! Get ready for an amazing experience.
How was it? Share your experience with other explorers.
Your honest review helps other explorers choose the right experience.
Discover the countryside,one farm at a time
Connect with rural hosts across France offering immersive farm stays, fishing trips, artisan workshops, and harvest experiences.
The explorer will be notified that their request was declined. Optionally, you can provide a reason.
Title must be at least 10 characters
Describe what guests will do each day. This helps explorers understand what to expect.
No pending booking requests at the moment.
Create your first experience to start receiving bookings.
